overview: A professional academic journal submission platform where users can submit research papers with personal details, PDF upload, and screenshot image. Admin receives email notifications with one-click accept/reject links. Approved papers are displayed publicly on a Latest Papers gallery page.
features: Paper submission form with name, email, age, college name fields
PDF upload with 20MB size limit and file type validation
Screenshot image upload with type validation
Admin email notification with Accept/Reject action links
Acceptance email to users upon approval
Professional black, white, and grey design
